form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 5th (Fr1) over 1177m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 10 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $81. Before that 8th (Fr3) over 1684m after showing early speed at Pinjarra beaten 30 m by Gelsomino Amal (2:04.40) in 4yo+ 1-3 WINs M on March 23 at $91. Finds a few better. This will fully test.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6 m finishing fifth after showing early speed, behind Hes A Cool Mach at Pinjarra over 1177m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $7. form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 10th (Fr8) over 2130m at this track, beaten 55 m by The Swindler (2:35.60) in 4yo+ 0W/17 0K stake M on March 13 at $126. Showed ability the outing before when she won by 2.5 m when quickly away, (Fr7) at this track (2:06.90) beating Sonic Seelster in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on March 3 at $6.50. Capable of more than she has shown recently. Has a low draw this time and can improve.
